mapper.insert: INSERT INTO warehouse_user(username, password, real_name, phone, email, role, status) VALUES(#{username}, #{password}, #{realName}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{role}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE warehouse_user SET is_deleted=1 WHERE id=#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM warehouse_user WHERE id=#{id} AND is_deleted=0
SELECT * FROM warehouse_user WHERE username=#{username} AND is_deleted=0
SELECT * FROM warehouse_user WHERE is_deleted=0 ORDER BY created_at DESC
